'''Qusyte''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Quyste system/Legends|Quyste system]] within the [[Thesme sector/Legends|Thesme sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] on which [[Talon Karrde]] had a training center. The [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] sent [[H'sishi/Legends|H'sishi]] there before [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]] to study [[Starship/Legends|starship]] operations.
